theme: iterative refinement rule for fixed-point maps whose conditioning ranges from benign to near-critical across the instance set
title: Regime-Aware Relaxation: Accelerating Ill-Conditioned Fixed-Point Maps
strategies: trivial: keep iterating the plain map (omega=1, no Aitken) -- equals the baseline
greedy: estimate the rate from the last step-norm ratio, assume a real mode, over-relax with omega=1/(1-rate) and always run Aitken -- diverges on the oscillatory traps
strong: fit the 2-term step recurrence to diagnose real vs complex dominant mode; over-relax + Aitken for a real mode, under-relax + no Aitken for a complex (oscillatory) mode
richer: emit a full per-step omega schedule and hand-tuned Aitken cadence beyond the single-mode heuristic
